_meta.honesty: PRELIMINARY. n_actionable=4 directional of 25 (21 PASS, synth-gate ratchet); theses all dated 2026-05-05→10 so only 5d horizon has elapsed — 20d/60d/120d PENDING (not enough time). HK names NOW UNBLOCKED via yfinance (HSI benchmark; HSTECH = proxy 3033.HK). No CORE validation verdict is drawn from this — it is descriptive + the live-position beta attribution. The position 'residual' is an UPPER BOUND on thesis-α (single-factor benchmark leaves sector/theme beta in residual). See CORE_VALIDATION_PLAN_2026-05-29.md.

catalyst.event: 2026 H1 results disclosure — first primary disclosure that quantifies whether Q1 2026 store-expansion restart is preserving (or eroding) the +35% NI YoY margin gain; resolves both bull and bear core link
catalyst.date_or_window: 2026-08-15 to 2026-08-31 [external estimate, not in our data context]
catalyst.source: Historical H1 reporting window for A-share retailers; exact date not in our data context

wrongIf: PASS thesis invalidated (forces re-engage either direction) if 2026 H1 report discloses all three of: store count YoY delta, SSSG, and segment-level new-store margins @ 2026 H1 报告 (≈2026-08-28) | source: 2026 H1 报告 经营数据章节 + 分部数据 | if_not_disclosed: INSUFFICIENT_DISCLOSURE

PASS thesis invalidated if pre-print primary disclosure (e.g. monthly operating bulletin or interim store-count filing) prints store count YoY ≥ 10% before 2026-07-31 @ interim 公告 | source: 临时公告 经营数据 | if_not_disclosed: INSUFFICIENT_DISCLOSURE

PASS thesis invalidated if 融资余额 falls below 1.8亿 with price < 17.0 before 2026-07-31 (forced-unwind shorting opportunity) @ Tushare margin daily | source: Tushare margin_detail 融资余额 + daily close | if_not_disclosed: INSUFFICIENT_DISCLOSURE

catalyst.event: Q2 2026 earnings release — first full quarter test of whether BRUKINSA (zanubrutinib) ex-US growth + sonrotoclax (BCL-2) Phase 3 CELESTIAL-TN readout timeline can offset accelerating US BTK market saturation and Pfizer/AbbVie pricing pressure
catalyst.date_or_window: 2026-08-06 (±5 days, Q2 2026 earnings; CELESTIAL-TN Phase 3 interim 4Q2026)
catalyst.source: BeOne Medicines IR calendar; ClinicalTrials.gov NCT04830137 (CELESTIAL-TN); company 10-Q/20-F

wrongIf: Q2 26 BRUKINSA total revenue ≥$1.05B AND US QoQ ≥+8% — saturation thesis invalidated
Non-GAAP operating margin reaches ≥8% in Q2 26 with sustained trajectory toward 12% by Q4 26
CELESTIAL-TN interim shows HR ≤0.60 with clean safety — pipeline optionality confirmed, multi-asset franchise validated

catalyst.event: Tencent Q2 2026 earnings release — first full quarter showing AI capex run-rate impact on operating margin AND Yuanbao/Hunyuan monetization KPIs (DAU, advertising CPM uplift from AI-targeted inventory)
catalyst.date_or_window: 2026-08-13 (±1 week, based on historical Q2 reporting cadence)
catalyst.source: Tencent IR historical reporting calendar; FY2025 capex guidance of low-teens % of revenue ramping into 2026

wrongIf: Q2 2026 non-IFRS operating margin ≥36% — D&A absorbed by revenue mix improvement
Management quantifies AI revenue contribution ≥RMB 5bn annualized run-rate by Q2 2026
Two consecutive quarters (Q1 + Q2 2026) of advertising growth ≥22% YoY, validating AI ad monetization thesis
Stock breaks above HK$760 on Q2 print → close short, thesis invalidated

attribution.caveat: residual is UPPER BOUND on thesis-α: single-factor CSI300 only removes broad-market beta, NOT sector/theme beta. An AI-optical name's theme rally (not in CSI300) leaks into residual and is indistinguishable from thesis skill without a sector/peer benchmark.

residual is UPPER BOUND on thesis-α: single-factor CSI300 only removes broad-market beta, NOT sector/theme beta. An AI-optical name's theme rally (not in CSI300) leaks into residual and is indistinguishable from thesis skill without a sector/peer benchmark.
